think.notes: Questioned all 7 conditions from research evidence. gap_freq p=0.25 (removed). ATR/vol 56% correlated but kept as separate AND (strictness > redundancy). Conviction replaced with equal-weight rank.

research.notes: Condition decomposition: 7 individual MW tests, AND combo monotonicity, alternative conviction scores, redundancy analysis.

classify.notes: No regime changes needed. Same exits/stops applicable.

design.notes: 6 entry conditions (removed gap_freq). Equal-weight conviction: 5-feature percentile rank average.

validate.notes: 21d CAGR +3.12% (+0.38% vs old). MaxDD -6.49% (-35% vs old). Trades +103. All metrics improved. Not deployment-ready (Sharpe negative at 6.5% RFR, 87% exits not_in_universe).

build.notes: Changes in src/backtest.py: -ENTRY_GAP_FREQ, -ENTRY_ATR_MULT, -ENTRY_VOL_MULT, -compute_conviction(). +equal_weight_conviction(). 5 conditions +2 kept as AND. git diff confirms clean 26-line change.
